description: List extensions available in the official marketplace (covers `neomind extension market-list`; no .nep file needed).

turns.user: What extensions are currently available in the official marketplace?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind extension market-list` (or GET /api/extensions/marketplace)
expectations.overall: Marketplace unconfigured or network failure is a valid answer, but the tool must actually be invoked
